mapper.sql: select id, order_no, elder_id, elder_name, elder_id_card, phone, nursing_level, bed_no, nurse_names, companion_type, companion_name, companion_phone, leave_start_time, planned_return_time, leave_days, leave_reason, process_instance_id, current_task_key, current_task_name, status, actual_return_time, actual_leave_days, is_returned, apply_user_id, apply_user_name, apply_time, remark, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from lc_elder_leave
mapper.insert:
insert into lc_elder_leave
order_no, elder_id, elder_name, elder_id_card, phone, nursing_level, bed_no, nurse_names, companion_type, companion_name, companion_phone, leave_start_time, planned_return_time, leave_days, leave_reason, process_instance_id, current_task_key, current_task_name, status, actual_return_time, actual_leave_days, is_returned, apply_user_id, apply_user_name, apply_time, remark, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time,
#{orderNo}, #{elderId}, #{elderName}, #{elderIdCard}, #{phone}, #{nursingLevel}, #{bedNo}, #{nurseNames}, #{companionType}, #{companionName}, #{companionPhone}, #{leaveStartTime}, #{plannedReturnTime}, #{leaveDays}, #{leaveReason}, #{processInstanceId}, #{currentTaskKey}, #{currentTaskName}, #{status}, #{actualReturnTime}, #{actualLeaveDays}, #{isReturned}, #{applyUserId}, #{applyUserName}, #{applyTime}, #{remark}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime},
mapper.delete:
delete from lc_elder_leave where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select e.id AS elderId, e.name AS elderName, e.id_card_no AS elderIdCard, e.phone AS phone, nl.level_name AS nursingLevel, b.bed_number AS bedNo, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT n.name SEPARATOR '、') AS nurseNames from elder e left join lc_check_in_config cl on cl.elder_id = e.id left join lc_elder_nurse_assign en on en.elder_id = e.id left join lc_nurse n on en.nurse_id = n.id left join lc_nursing_level nl on cl.nursing_level_id = nl.id left join bed b on e.bed_id = b.id WHERE e.id = #{elderId} GROUP BY e.id, e.name, e.id_card_no, e.phone, nl.level_name, b.bed_number;

select id, order_no, elder_id, elder_name, elder_id_card, phone, nursing_level, bed_no, nurse_names, companion_type, companion_name, companion_phone, leave_start_time, planned_return_time, leave_days, leave_reason, process_instance_id, current_task_key, current_task_name, status, actual_return_time, actual_leave_days, is_returned, apply_user_id, apply_user_name, apply_time, remark, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from lc_elder_leave where process_instance_id = #{processInstanceId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
mapper.update: update lc_elder_leave set process_instance_id = #{processInstanceId}, current_task_key = #{currentTaskKey}, current_task_name = #{currentTaskName}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id AS elderId, name AS elderName FROM elder WHERE status = '1' ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: update lc_elder_leave set status = 'timeout' -- 数据库状态改为超时 where status = 'approved' -- 已批准 and (is_returned = 0 or is_returned is null) -- 未销假 and planned_return_time < NOW() -- 已超过应返回时间
